title: BBS Together
body:
# Welcome to BBS Together!

BBS Together is a forked version of the original [BBS Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/bbs-mod) made by [McHorse](https://www.patreon.com/c/McHorse) with full compatibility for a multiplayer environment! This fixes all of the packet and desync issues without compromising any of the existing features within the mod, along with a few new features to help visualize the experience of working alongside your friends!

BBS Together also works with [Sinytra Connector!](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector)

### New features include:
1. Color designation per-player using the Primary Color in the Settings panel.
2. Colored mouse cursors that display where other player's mouses are on each screen.
3. Player icons to display Film and Replay locations of players.
4. Selection highlights to display what other players have selected.
5. BBS asset syncing for all server types.
6. "/bbs record [selector]" to have all players record actors at the same time.

### Early Development
This fork is still early in development, so any feedback would be greatly appreciated! If you want to provide direct feedback and conversation, head over to the [BBS Together Discord server](https://discord.gg/kVburmRsNx) for any form of discussion directly about the mod! _It will likely be a dead server so join and leave as you please!_

### Future Features
- Ability to enable or disable asset syncing or toggle what exactly is sent.

### Known Issues / Incompatibilities
- No known incompatibilities.
